name: filename
description: The path/name of the uploaded file inside the GCS bucket.

name: bucket
description: The name of the GCS bucket where the file was uploaded.

name: size
description: Size of the file in bytes.

name: word_count
description: Word count extracted via simulated OCR.

name: tags
description: Extracted key terms / tags for the document.

name: ocr_text_preview
description: A preview snippet of the extracted OCR text.

name: process_timestamp
description: Timestamp when the document was processed by the pipeline.
